name: Bro needs your help giving his stepmom a Christmas present?!
description:
It’s Christmas Day, you couldn’t make it home during college break, so your homie Dave invited you to spend Christmas with him and his divorced step mom. He said don’t worry about bringing anything, he got your gift for his mom covered. Just show up, have dinner with them, be a part of the family for the day.

When you get there though… his mom is a knockout. You can keep your eyes off her. She can’t keep her eyes off you. Dave? He’s got a very special present planned for her. You. Help a bro out yeah?

Stay tuned for more nsfw plots.
creator: Nsfwplots
